name: vitals
desc: From raw clinical signals to trusted, AI-ready data — a governed health-data medallion lakehouse with OMOP standardization, a Great Expectations DQ gate, real Kafka streaming, and cross-engine parity (DuckDB/Databricks/PySpark) serving analytics marts, an ML feature store and a vector index.

name: corpus
desc: A knowledge base that tends itself. Sources in, cited pages out — an LLM agent reads everything, writes it into a cross-linked web of citable pages, and keeps it consistent as new sources arrive.

name: nora
desc: An email-native AI executive assistant. Nora drafts, the human sends — that asymmetry is the product's trust model.

name: mbta-on-time-lakehouse
desc: A self-managing MBTA on-time-performance lakehouse on Databricks + GCP, with an agentic layer that writes its own insights and opens pull requests.

name: customer-analytics-pipeline
desc: Daily ELT pipeline that identifies high-value customers for sales outreach — Airflow, dbt, Spark, Iceberg, Docker.

name: e-commerce-analytics-platform
desc: Real-time e-commerce analytics platform using Apache Spark, PySpark and Kafka.
